profile_note: Candidate reads as a generalist/early-career engineer leaning frontend on paper, with real but buried backend signal. Not a literal keyword match on the hard must-haves (Go/Java/Kafka/distributed) — treat as a transferable-skills case, surface Python+DB+API bridges, and be honest about the distributed-systems gap.
